latest.title: Neuroscientist: “You Could Create a False Reality With Brain Chips”
latest.desc: Louisa Nicola gives her thoughts on the risks, potential, and unknowns surrounding brain intervention technology like Neuralink, breaking down how deep brain stimulation is already being used in real-world medical settings to treat conditions like Parkinson’s.
